name: ffds
description: Food Freshness Detection System — root workspace runner

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend/core-api" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm start --prefix backend/core-api" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/core-api && npm install --prefix frontend
